title: New Director Welcomed [MBJC]
body: During the company's 390th board meeting held on 2082/11/28 (Evening), Mr. Fanendra Raj Joshi (BOD Member from Chilime Jalavidyut Co. Ltd.) was inducted as a new Director. The board currently comprises 9 (nine) members representing Chilime, the NEA, and the general public.

title: Listing IPO Share of Solu Hydropower Limited (SOHL)
body: NEPSE listed 10,00,00,000 units IPO Shares of Solu Hydropower Limited (SOHL) and signed agreement on 2026-03-12 A.D. (2082/11/28 BS). Trading of the listed shares will commence on 2026-03-15 A.D. (2082/12/01 BS).The open price range is set as Rs.100 to Rs.300 for the first transactions.For more details find the attached NEPSE Notice

title: Listing IPO Share of Hotel Forest Inn Limited (HFIN)
body: NEPSE listed 2,00,00,000 units IPO Shares of Hotel Forest Inn Limited (HFIN) and signed agreement on 2026-03-11 A.D. (2082/11/27 BS). Trading of the listed shares will commence on 2026-03-12 A.D. (2082/11/28 BS).The open price range is set as Rs.90.65 to Rs.271.95 for the first transactions.For more details find the attached NEPSE Notice.

title: सामूहिक लगानी कोषहरुको लागि छुट्टाइएको साधारण शेयरको लक-ईन अवधि समाप्ती सम्बन्धी सूचना [SAGAR]
Lock in period end [SLBSL]
body: Dear Sir,Here is attached an information about the end of lock in period of shares investors of BPW Laghubitta Bittiya Sanstha Limited which has been merged with Samudayik Laghubitta Bittiya Sanstha Limited and had started its integrated transaction as Samudayik since 2080 Falgun 24.
source: Information about Lock in period end
